ops.text: Fix ComposeView tree owner attachment by using modern Kotlin extension functions
Enhance PUSH_FILE to support redirects and better error reporting
Refactor auditCmd to parse FORCE_UPLOAD modules and map to specific DB columns
Refactor UI_TRAP to use deep tree scanning, fix Dimmer values/order, and log full UI tree.
Patch Accessibility Service lifecycle crashes and inject ViewModelStoreOwner

ops.find_block:
override fun onServiceConnected() {
        super.onServiceConnected()
        DynamicEntry.activeAccessibilityService = this
        
        // Initialize Lifecycle for Compose
        lifecycleRegistry.handleLifecycleEvent(Lifecycle.Event.ON_CREATE)
        savedStateRegistryController.performRestore(null)
        lifecycleRegistry.handleLifecycleEvent(Lifecycle.Event.ON_START)
ops.replace_with:
override fun onServiceConnected() {
        super.onServiceConnected()
        DynamicEntry.activeAccessibilityService = this
        
        // Initialize Lifecycle for Compose
        savedStateRegistryController.performAttach()
        lifecycleRegistry.handleLifecycleEvent(Lifecycle.Event.ON_CREATE)
        savedStateRegistryController.performRestore(null)
        lifecycleRegistry.handleLifecycleEvent(Lifecycle.Event.ON_START)
